scaler.note: z-score (x - mean) / std is applied AFTER building the raw 15-feature vector. The per-feature means/stds + is_continuous mask are model-version-specific and live in the model's metadata.json (feature_scaler), NOT in this structural contract - so the schema_hash stays stable across retrains. The one-hot columns (stand_*, base_state_*) carry mean=0 / std=1 (identity); the continuous launch_speed/angle/spray/hit_distance + outs are scaled.

output.note: Per decision [141], v1 is a calibrated per-park OUTCOME model. The per-park axis is a physics-retrodicted estimate, NOT a validated cross-park park-factor ranking (cross-park Spearman vs observed_norm ~0.30; cross-park fidelity is documented future work). Per-park isotonic calibrators (calibrator.json) are applied to the raw softmax before serving.

description: Canonical Python<->Java feature contract for the Phase 2c batted-ball outcome model (battedball_outcome): 15 input features -> per-park 5-class outcome distribution. Sibling of feature_pipeline_post.json; mirrored on the Java side by FeaturePipelineBattedBall.
notes: Both /backend (registry schema-hash check at registration, rule 7) and /training read the feature_order from here. The schema_hash is recomputed over canonical JSON (sort_keys, no whitespace, schema_hash field zeroed) by FeatureSchemaHasher (Java) and the .githooks/pre-commit Python snippet. NOTE: the pre-commit hook currently only auto-checks feature_pipeline.json; this contract's hash is enforced at model load (FeaturePipelineBattedBall.verifySchemaHash) and at registration. The 15-feature order must match training's features_shared.FEATURE_NAMES.
